title: Palindrome Checker
description: Check if a given string is a valid palindrome, ignoring spaces and punctuation.
part_a_prompt: # PART A: Write a helper function 'clean_string' that removes all non-alphanumeric characters and converts to lowercase.
part_b_prompt: # PART B: Use your partner's 'clean_string' to implement 'is_palindrome(s)'. Return a boolean.
